Name: Afandem
About: The Turkish cuisine offers a variety of mouthwatering dishes, derived from the Eastern fragrance of Asia, combined with a western touch. The amazing geographical nature, along with the glorious historical past of Turkey, allows chefs to develop enrich flavors that reflects creativity and culture.Afendim Restauranst is your gateway to enjoy a Turkish ambience with the best Turkish dishes in Kuwait.
